variants.title: RHR850M10B
variants.option1Value: Filtrec RHR850M10B3/AB1 Return Filter | Replaces the Filtrec RHR850M10B
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec RHR850M10B3/AB1. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the RHR850M10B3/AB1 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Return Filter, Media: Synthetic, Efficiency 1: 13µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 15µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 114.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 68.4 mm, Length: 412.0 mm, Bypass Pressure: 3.0 BAR bar, Δ Collapse Pressure: 20 bar, Seal Material: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 13µ @ β200, Media Type: Synthetic, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Bypass Pressure Bypass pressure relieve build-up of pressure within the system and allows medium to bypass the element when pressure increases and reaches a sufficient level.: 3.0 BAR, Collapse Pressure: 20 BAR, Seal: Nitrile

variants.title: RHR850M10B
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SH 74490 SP Return Filter | Replaces the Filtrec RHR850M10B
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SH 74490 SP Hydraulic Filter. Engineered to protect and optimize the performance of hydraulic systems, this filter delivers exceptional contamination control. Premium filter media captures fine particles and debris that could compromise system integrity, helping to extend the lifespan of critical hydraulic components. By maintaining fluid cleanliness, it reduces wear and tear while supporting consistent pressure levels throughout the system. Perfect for a wide range of hydraulic applications—from industrial machinery to heavy-duty equipment—this filter provides reliable performance even under high-pressure conditions. Its robust construction ensures long-lasting durability, helping to minimize downtime and maintenance costs while maximizing operational efficiency.
specifications: Style: HYDRAULIC FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 114.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 84.5 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 68.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 412.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 395.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 387.0 mm, No. Bypass Valves: 1, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 13µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 15µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 114.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 68.4 mm, Length: 412.0 mm, Media Type: Synthetic, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Bypass Pressure Bypass pressure relieve build-up of pressure within the system and allows medium to bypass the element when pressure increases and reaches a sufficient level.: 3.0 BAR, Collapse Pressure: 20 BAR, Seal: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C

variants.option1Value: Hydac 0850 R 010 MM Return Filter | Replaces the Filtrec RHR850M10B
variants.description: Genuine Hydac 0850 R 010 MM Return Filter. Built to HYDAC’s OEM specifications and quality standards, this genuine part offers reliable performance, long service life and a precise fit. It’s suitable for a wide range of hydraulic and process applications, helping protect equipment, reduce downtime and maintain system cleanliness. For best results, match the part code to your equipment manual and verify key dimensions and ratings (size, connection, filtration grade/flow) before installation.
